productDisplayName: Puma Men White Future Cat Shoes
description: Style Note puma gives you shoes that will make you want to go on a run with these stylish shoes. Designed for maximum comfort and easy using, these pair of shoes raises your style quotient while out for your regular run. Look good and feel even better with these trendy running shoes. Product Details Round blunt white shoes with asymmetrical lacing and silver form stripes on one side and the jumping cat logo on the other Fabric interiors with padding at the mouth and a cushioned footbed The outsole reinforced onto the heel to act as a heel guard Rubber midsole TPU outsole with grooves  Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight or machine wash
